answers: Water purification methods: boiling (easiest), filtration (removes particles), chlorination, UV treatment, reverse osmosis (best).
Home filters: activated carbon (removes taste/odor), RO (removes most contaminants), UV (kills bacteria). RO is most thorough.
Boiling water for 1 minute kills most pathogens. Let it cool, then store in clean container. Simplest method.
Pani filter types: RO filter (best quality), UV filter (kills germs), carbon filter (taste improve kore). RO recommended.
